stemHtml: An aircraft is approaching Girona airport (LEGE) passing the IAF BANOL, when the crew notices a warning regarding the extension of the landing gear. The crew requests a low pass of the tower for a visual check of the landing gear extension. What is the correct phraseology?

options.a: PAN PAN, PAN PAN, PAN PAN, Girona tower, Globeair xxx, suspect undercarriage malfunction, request low pass for visual check, passing BANOL.
options.b: PAN PAN, PAN PAN, PAN PAN, Girona tower, Globeair xxx, suspect undercarriage malfunction, request low pass for visual check, going around.
options.c: MAYDAY MAYDAY MAYDAY, Girona tower, Globeair xxx, suspect undercarriage malfunction, request low pass for visual check, passing BANOL.
options.d: PAN PAN, PAN PAN, PAN PAN, Girona tower, Globeair xxx, cockpit anomaly, request low pass for visual check, going around.
